# Keiser Lab @ UCSF

> Systems pharmacology lab at UCSF. Methods and open-source tools for
> polypharmacology, phenotypic screen deconvolution, and precision drug
> response, with applications across neurodegeneration, cancer, and drug
> safety.

## Site map

- [Research directions](https://keiserlab.org/research/)
- [Publications](https://keiserlab.org/publications/) — citations with preprint, code, and data links
- [Code & data](https://keiserlab.org/resources/) — per-paper code repositories and datasets
- [People](https://keiserlab.org/people/)
- [News](https://keiserlab.org/news/)
- [Contact](https://keiserlab.org/contact/)

## Code archive

- [github.com/keiserlab](https://github.com/keiserlab) — complete public code archive

## Optional

- [RSS feed](https://keiserlab.org/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://keiserlab.org/sitemap.xml)
